title: Pre-Alpha v1.1.1 Painting Textures
description: A texture pack that replaces the "Seaside" & "The Stage Is Set" paintings with their original textures, which were changed in Alpha v1.1.1
body:
# Pre-Alpha v1.1.1 Painting Textures

### Just a small and simple texture pack that replaces the _"Seaside"_ & _"The Stage Is Set"_ paintings with their original textures, which were changed in Alpha v1.1.1.
### 
This started with me browsing the Minecraft wiki and discovering that these two paintings had a different texture when they were first added. I really dislike how the _"Seaside"_ painting looks like, so when I saw that it had an original version, which in my eyes fixes all that is wrong with it and resembles the original painting by Zetterstrand more closely, I had to make a simple texture pack to have it replaced. This lead me to deciding to do the same with _"The Stage Is Set"_ painting, and eventually publish them here, just in case someone else wants to bring back these relics. An afternoon well spent!

![Original texture of the painting "The Stage Is Set"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eef1cc36a5301933a5dbc733c342a4adf8d4691f.png) ![Original texture of the painting "Seaside"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e22b5cae5709daf4252f66fcea4f41cb9a6d599.png)

Thanks to the Minecraft.wiki for providing me with the old textures of these paintings.

**The texture pack was made for the version 1.21.8. All the other versions that are mentioned in the file downloads were tested. You can ignore the "Icompatible" pop up when equipping the texture pack on your desired version.** For any questions, feel free to contact me on Discord @arrefur. Thank you for downloading this texture pack :3

### The downloads have both the version of the pack that contains both of the paintings, and the two individual painting packs, if you want to only have one or the other.
